text.Build trips that fit your budget, then t: Crea viajes que encajen con tu presupuesto y viaja con un compañero en vivo.
text.Roamly checks estimated flights, stays,: Roamly revisa vuelos, alojamiento, actividades, comida y transporte local estimados antes de crear tu itinerario. Sube capturas de reservas, desbloquea tu viaje y deja que Roamly guíe tu día.
text.Roamly checks trip costs before building: Roamly revisa los costos antes de crear el plan, para que el itinerario se diseñe según tu presupuesto real.
text.Upload hotel, flight, ticket, or reserva: Sube capturas de hotel, vuelo, boleto o reserva y Roamly las convierte en tu línea de tiempo.
text.Unlock reminders, packing lists, documen: Desbloquea recordatorios, listas de equipaje, revisión de documentos, activación del día 1, actividades cercanas y guía de lo siguiente.
text.From countdown to check-in, Roamly stays: Desde la cuenta regresiva hasta el check-in, Roamly acompaña al viajero.
text.Get one-week reminders, document and pac: Recibe recordatorios de una semana, listas de documentos y equipaje, cuenta regresiva de 24 horas, línea de reservas, detección de actividades cercanas, check-ins, omisiones, guía siguiente y enlaces a Google Maps, Apple Maps y Citymapper.
text.One free itinerary. Then unlock only the: Un itinerario gratis. Luego desbloquea solo el viaje que necesitas.
text.No subscriptions. Each account gets 1 fr: Sin suscripciones. Cada cuenta tiene 1 itinerario gratis y luego compras únicas por viaje.
Genera un itinerario completo por cuenta. Una vez creado, queda bloqueado y no se puede editar.
text.Generate one locked day-by-day itinerary: Genera un itinerario diario bloqueado para un viaje. Ideal si solo necesitas el plan.
text.Add reminders, document and packing chec: Agrega recordatorios, documentos, equipaje, reservas, activación del día 1, actividades cercanas y ayuda siguiente a un itinerario bloqueado.
text.Complete Trip Pack: full itinerary plus: Paquete completo: itinerario completo más Compañero en vivo para un viaje. Ahorra $0.99.
Tu centro de control de viajes.
text.Continue a draft, open a locked itinerar: Continúa un borrador, abre un itinerario bloqueado o entra al Compañero en vivo.
text.Start with one free itinerary per accoun: Empieza con un itinerario gratis por cuenta. Desbloquea solo los viajes nuevos que quieras usar.
Inicia sesión y mantén tus viajes juntos.
text.Roamly uses standalone Supabase Auth wit: Roamly usa Supabase Auth independiente con perfiles y viajes dedicados.
text.Keep the profile simple. Roamly only nee: Mantén el perfil simple. Roamly solo necesita la identidad para viajes, propiedad y soporte.
text.Roamly can remind you about packing, doc: Roamly puede recordarte equipaje, documentos, horarios de check-in y lo que sigue durante el viaje.
text.Phone reminders are blocked. You can sti: Los recordatorios del teléfono están bloqueados. Aún puedes usar notificaciones internas.
Los recordatorios del teléfono están activados.
Las notificaciones internas funcionan automáticamente. Los recordatorios requieren permiso del navegador.
text.This itinerary is locked. To make major: Este itinerario está bloqueado. Para cambios grandes, crea un itinerario nuevo.
text.A smarter trip flow, from plan to travel: Un flujo de viaje más inteligente, del plan al día del viaje.
text.Plan with cost awareness, import what yo: Planifica con costos claros, importa tus reservas y sigue el viaje desde un lugar limpio para móvil.
text.Start free. Unlock only when the trip is: Empieza gratis. Desbloquea solo cuando el viaje sea real.
One full itinerary is free per account. Paid unlocks are one-time purchases for one trip, not subscriptions.
text.Roamly — budget-aware trips with a Live: Roamly — viajes según tu presupuesto con Live Trip Companion.
text.One free itinerary now. One-time trip pa: One free itinerary now. One-time trip packs later.
text.No buyer/seller/admin tier complexity. R: No buyer/seller/admin tier complexity. Roamly stays light.
text.Check your email to verify your Roamly a: Check your email to verify your Roamly account, then log in.
text.Use at least 8 characters for the passwo: Use at least 8 characters for the password.
Your Live Trip Companion is ready.
text.Generate your free itinerary, or unlock: Generate your free itinerary, or unlock a paid itinerary for a new trip.
text.Payments unlock one itinerary or Live Tr: Payments unlock one itinerary or Live Trip Companion for one trip.
text.Roamly uses your location only to activa: Roamly uses your location only to activate trip mode, show nearby activities, and help with your travel timeline. You can turn it off anytime.
text.Use your comfortable total. Roamly check: Use your comfortable total. Roamly checks flights, stays, food, activities, local transportation, and buffer before generation.
text.Add mobility needs, must-see spots, food: Add mobility needs, must-see spots, food restrictions, celebrations, weather backup plans, or anything Roamly should consider.
text.Review your trip details carefully. Once: Review your trip details carefully. Once your itinerary is generated, it cannot be edited. New destinations, date changes, or major changes require a new itinerary.
text.One custom itinerary for one trip. No su: One custom itinerary for one trip. No subscription.
You get 1 free itinerary per account.
text.Once generated, this itinerary cannot be: Once generated, this itinerary cannot be edited or regenerated. Please confirm your destination, dates, travelers, budget, and preferences are correct.
text.Your budget is tight. Roamly will priori: Your budget is tight. Roamly will prioritize affordable stays, free attractions, public transit, and low-cost food.
text.This trip may exceed your budget. You ca: This trip may exceed your budget. You can still continue, but Roamly recommends changing dates, destination, trip length, or excluding flights/hotel.
Your trip looks possible within budget.
text.Unlock Live Trip Companion to show trip: Unlock Live Trip Companion to show trip reminders, booking timeline updates, and airline-style live updates here.
text.Review your trip details before generati: Review your trip details before generating. Once generated, this itinerary is locked permanently.
text.The itinerary is permanent for this trip: The itinerary is permanent for this trip. Live Trip Companion is optional per trip.
text.Generate once to lock the final itinerar: Generate once to lock the final itinerary for this trip.
This itinerary is final for this trip.
text.To change destination, dates, traveler c: To change destination, dates, traveler count, budget, interests, or schedule, create a new itinerary. Live Trip Companion can be added without changing the itinerary.
text.Full details, addresses, maps, timing, c: Full details, addresses, maps, timing, checklist, and activity details are shown only after this itinerary is generated and locked.
text.Generate and lock this itinerary to see: Generate and lock this itinerary to see the full details.
text.Generate this trip when the details are: Generate this trip when the details are final.
text.Once generated, the itinerary cannot be: Once generated, the itinerary cannot be edited or regenerated.
Unlock the companion for this trip.
text.Roamly keeps the trip timeline, booking: Roamly keeps the trip timeline, booking reminders, nearby activities, check-ins, and up-next guidance in one mobile-friendly place.
Live Trip Companion is not unlocked yet.
text.Add the companion to use phone reminders: Add the companion to use phone reminders, check-ins, skips, nearby sensing, and travel-day guidance.
text.Roamly will surface the next useful stop: Roamly will surface the next useful stop.
text.Roamly will keep your in-app timeline re: Roamly will keep your in-app timeline ready. Phone reminders are optional.
text.Document requirements can change. Please: Document requirements can change. Please verify official government, embassy, airline, and destination sources before travel.
Document requirements can change. Please verify official sources before travel.
text.Send the trip destination, account email: Send the trip destination, account email, and a short description of what happened. Keep booking confirmations and urgent travel changes with the provider too.
text.Roamly stores account email, profile nam: Roamly stores account email, profile name, trip inputs, itinerary data, booking fields you confirm, checklist status, payments, and basic usage counts.
text.Roamly stores trip data in its standalon: Roamly guarda los datos de viaje en su proyecto Supabase independiente con tablas roamly_.
text.Trip details may be sent to the OpenAI A: Trip details may be sent to the OpenAI API to generate itineraries. Locked itineraries are not regenerated.
text.Stripe handles checkout. Roamly stores p: Stripe handles checkout. Roamly stores payment status and Stripe identifiers, not raw card numbers.
text.Roamly asks for location and push permis: Roamly asks for location and push permission only when Live Trip Companion needs it. In-app reminders still work if phone/browser push is denied.
text.You can log out, update your profile, tu: You can log out, update your profile, turn off trip sensing, and contact support for account or trip data questions.
text.Roamly provides AI-generated travel plan: Roamly provides AI-generated travel planning assistance, 1 free itinerary per account, paid full itinerary unlocks, and live trip organization tools.
text.You must verify opening hours, prices, v: You must verify opening hours, prices, visa rules, passport requirements, booking terms, transit schedules, weather, safety conditions, and local laws before traveling.
text.Paid Full Itinerary Unlocks, Live Trip C: Paid Full Itinerary Unlocks, Live Trip Companion add-ons, and Complete Trip Packs are one-time digital purchases. Once generated, an itinerary is locked and cannot be remade or regenerated.
text.Roamly may suggest places, areas, search: Roamly may suggest places, areas, searches, and map queries, but it does not guarantee availability, safety, accuracy, or booking completion.
text.Some booking, hotel, activity, transport: Some booking, hotel, activity, transport, or insurance links may be affiliate links. Roamly may earn from qualifying purchases at no extra cost to you.
text.Select a known destination to reduce pla: Selecciona un destino conocido para reducir errores de planificación. También puedes escribir un destino personalizado si no está en la lista.
text.Please choose or enter a destination bef: Elige o escribe un destino antes de continuar.
text.Custom destinations may use estimated tr: Los destinos personalizados pueden usar datos de viaje estimados.
text.Choose a known origin to improve flight: Elige un origen conocido para mejorar las estimaciones de vuelos y transporte. También puedes escribir un origen personalizado si no aparece.
text.Please choose or enter your origin befor: Elige o escribe tu origen antes de continuar.
text.Add each city in the order you want to v: Agrega cada ciudad en el orden en que quieres visitarla. Roamly creará la ruta y el presupuesto alrededor de esas paradas.
text.Please add at least two cities for a mul: Agrega al menos dos ciudades para un viaje multidestino.
text.Multi-city estimates use broad travel ra: Las estimaciones multidestino usan rangos amplios hasta que se conecten socios de rutas en vivo.
text.You’ve used your free itinerary. Unlock: Ya usaste tu itinerario gratis. Desbloquea este viaje para generar un nuevo itinerario completo.
text.Tester activity is excluded from revenue: La actividad de testers se excluye de los totales de ingresos cuando es posible.
text.Roamly may earn a commission when you bo: Roamly puede ganar una comisión cuando reservas mediante enlaces de socios. Esto no cambia tu precio.
text.Plan smarter trips with AI that understa: Plan smarter trips with AI that understands your budget.
text.Roamly helps you build realistic single-: Roamly helps you build realistic single-city or multi-city itineraries, check your budget before you go, organize bookings, and turn your trip into a live companion.
Start with a free AI itinerary.
text.Pay only when you unlock more planning o: Pay only when you unlock more planning or companion features.
text.A cleaner planning flow before anything: A cleaner planning flow before anything is locked.
text.Start with route, dates, budget, and tra: Start with route, dates, budget, and travel style. Roamly checks the plan before building the full itinerary.
text.Choose an origin, one destination, or a: Choose an origin, one destination, or a connected multi-city path.
text.Roamly checks broad travel costs before: Roamly checks broad travel costs before the full itinerary is generated.
text.Add screenshots or confirmations so the: Add screenshots or confirmations so the AI respects fixed plans.
text.Turn the locked itinerary into reminders: Turn the locked itinerary into reminders and travel-day guidance.
text.Designed for trips with real constraints: Designed for trips with real constraints.
text.Budgets, bookings, pacing, walking toler: Budgets, bookings, pacing, walking tolerance, and city order all become planning context instead of afterthoughts.
text.See whether your route fits your budget: See whether your route fits your budget before generating the full itinerary.
text.Plan 2, 3, 5, or more cities in one conn: Plan 2, 3, 5, or more cities in one connected route.
text.Upload flight, hotel, train, or activity: Upload flight, hotel, train, or activity screenshots so Roamly can plan around what you already booked.
text.Turn your itinerary into reminders, chec: Turn your itinerary into reminders, check-ins, and next-step guidance while traveling.
text.Your trip details stay connected to your: Your trip details stay connected to your account and are used to build your itinerary.
text.Start free, then unlock extra planning o: Start free, then unlock extra planning or companion features only when you need them.
text.Start free, then unlock only when the tr: Start free, then unlock only when the trip needs more.
Create your first AI itinerary free.
text.If you need another full itinerary, Roam: If you need another full itinerary, Roamly will offer an unlock when you reach that step.
text.Add live reminders and trip guidance whe: Add live reminders and trip guidance when you want Roamly with you during the trip.
text.Unlock itinerary planning and companion: Unlock itinerary planning and companion features together when it makes sense.
text.Build the trip before you book the stres: Build the trip before you book the stress.
text.Start with your route, dates, budget, an: Start with your route, dates, budget, and travel style. Roamly checks the plan, then helps you generate a cleaner itinerary.
text.Roamly — premium AI travel planning for: Roamly — premium AI travel planning for budget-aware trips.
text.Flights, hotels, food, activities, trans: Flights, hotels, food, activities, transport, and buffer are reviewed before the itinerary is locked.
text.Roamly keeps reminders, bookings, and ne: Roamly keeps reminders, bookings, and next steps close when the trip starts.
text.Uploaded flight, stay, rail, and activit: Uploaded flight, stay, rail, and activity confirmations become planning context for the route.
text.Start free, then unlock more only when t: Start free, then unlock more only when the trip needs it.
text.Roamly shows paid unlocks at the moment: Roamly shows paid unlocks at the moment they apply: after your free itinerary is used, when you need another full itinerary, or when you add Live Trip Companion to a trip.
text.Planning tools stay clear until checkout: Planning tools stay clear until checkout.
text.Exact unlock amounts appear only when yo: Exact unlock amounts appear only when you reach an authenticated checkout or trip unlock screen.
text.Unlock another full itinerary only when: Unlock another full itinerary only when you need it
text.Itinerary plus Live Trip Companion when: Itinerary plus Live Trip Companion when it makes sense
